name: treasury-analyst-skills
description: A growing personal library of Claude Code Agent Skills for cash management, Oracle OTBI reporting, accounting, banking, finance, BI/analytics, machine learning, continuous improvement, and coding/agents. Every skill both does the task and teaches the reasoning.

plugins.name: cash-management-skills
plugins.description: Treasury cash operations: cash positioning, bank reconciliation, forecasting, liquidity, controls, and intercompany netting.

plugins.name: oracle-otbi-skills
plugins.description: Build OTBI reports and analyses in Oracle Fusion Cloud, with deep Cash Management subject-area coverage.

plugins.name: banking-skills
plugins.description: Payment rails, bank account structures, statement formats, bank-fee analysis, connectivity, and KYC/AML basics.

plugins.name: accounting-skills
plugins.description: Double-entry accounting, journal entries, chart of accounts, month-end close, reconciliations, and financial statements.

plugins.name: finance-skills
plugins.description: Corporate and treasury finance: time value of money, working capital, ratios, short-term investing, FX risk, and capital budgeting.

plugins.name: data-analytics-bi-skills
plugins.description: SQL, exploratory analysis, data cleaning, statistics, inference, dashboard design, and spreadsheet modeling for business intelligence.

plugins.name: machine-learning-skills
plugins.description: Framing ML problems, time-series forecasting, supervised modeling, evaluation, feature engineering, and anomaly detection.

plugins.name: continuous-improvement-skills
plugins.description: Lean, Toyota Production System, Six Sigma, and co-design: value-stream mapping, root-cause analysis, DMAIC, standard work, A3, and kaizen.

plugins.name: coding-agent-skills
plugins.description: Python for analysts, Claude Code harness config, autonomous agent design, prompt engineering, git/code review, and authoring Agent Skills.
